theorem: Correction-surface monitor: 2/2/4 triad partition law, rule30 = rule90 XOR correction, exact binomial deviation proofs
adjudicated_divergence: product used a normal approximation for n > 100; forge computes the exact two-tailed binomial tail with math.comb for every n
async/API/agent layers stay product-side; only the proven monitoring core enters the forge ring
open_obligations: Detection-quality claims (false-positive rates on real telemetry) are product-layer empirical work, not paper claims.
Quantization of continuous metrics into triads needs its own receipt before metric fingerprints can be claim-bound.
